narrative:
West Chester Twp 40 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,036 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.3 percentage points.
